mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, 'OWNER' AS role FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}
UNION
SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, 'COMPANION' AS role FROM companion_requests cr JOIN posts p ON cr.post_id = p.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY start_date ASC, post_id DESC
